title: Upstream issue replay: decimal duration formatting

source.reportedBehavior: Duration.fromObject({ hour: 2.4 }).toFormat('hh:mm') returned 02:23 instead of 02:24; 5.3 returned 05:17 instead of 05:18.

prompt: repair an upstream issue replay for decimal hour duration formatting so 2.4 hours renders 02:24 and 5.3 hours renders 05:18 without regressing whole-hour formatting
